title: 哥本哈根詮釋係咪自相矛盾

replies.msg:

但邏輯世界唔會有生死同時係真，同時係假嘅出現。
如果唔係自相矛盾，點解？
定還是邏輯係微觀世界會失效？

推
我諗唔明
今晚訓唔到

replies.msg:
未定義？
唔知喎，生死可未定義咩

大部分真理，規條唔係自相矛盾就係又空又廢。

例如，宜間房一係無人一係有人。

邏輯上完全正確，但廢到爆。

變化是惟一嘅永恆，

咁宜句野又係未絕對正確？

但邏輯世界唔會有生死同時係真，同時係假嘅出現。

或者咁講
係未打開箱果陣有條友咁講
呢隻貓係生，同時呢隻貓又係死
但咁樣有謬誤，因為佢句子自相矛盾
兩個分句唔可以同時係真，同時係假

Copenhagen interpretation剩係話隻貓係50% chance係生, 50% chance 係死
而你一日未開箱，一日都唔會有一個definate state
點解你要曲解佢做同時生同時死？

quote.msg: 薛丁格的貓本身係用嚟突顥哥本哈根詮釋既荒謬
點解科學家又選擇接受哥本哈根詮釋

replies.msg:
然而，與哥本哈根詮釋有密切淵源的量子大師尼爾斯·玻爾從來都不認同觀察引起的波函數塌縮這概念。薛定諤貓對他來說並不是什麼謎題，在盒子被一個有意識觀察者打開之前，貓早已不是死的就是活的了。[9]

對於真實實驗的分析顯示，測量本身（如用一個蓋格計數器）就足以使量子波函數塌縮，早在一個有意識的觀察者對測量結果進行觀察之前。[10]在原子放射出的粒子擊中探測器時，「觀察」就已經發生了，這種看法可以發展成為客觀塌縮理論。這思想實驗需要偵測器的無意識觀察才會出現放大效應。與之對比，多世界理論否認曾經發生任何塌縮。
所以有 quantum logic

其實哥本哈根詮釋唔認同意識導致wavefunction collapse
衰變原子一開始係quantum superposition
但隻貓唔係
當原子quantum state被測量，隻貓生死已經決定決定咗
而唔需要打開個盒先決定

薛丁格的貓本身係用嚟突顥哥本哈根詮釋既荒謬
點解科學家又選擇接受哥本哈根詮釋

的的確確係被measure 既一刻先會wave function collapse

replies.msg:
其實係咪有d誤會
你地講到好似有一個獨立於 interpretation 嘅 theory咁



https://plato.stanford.edu/entries/qt-issues/

One should not be misled by this terminology into thinking that what we have is an uninterpreted mathematical formalism with no connection to the physical world. Rather, there is a common core of interpretation that consists of recipes for calculating probabilities of outcomes of experiments performed on systems subjected to certain state preparation procedures. What are often referred to as different “interpretations” of quantum mechanics differ on what, if anything, is added to the common core. Arguably, two of the major approaches, hidden-variables theories and collapse theories, involve formulation of physical theories distinct from standard quantum mechanics; this renders the terminology of “interpretation” even more inappropriate.

樓主個問題係 make sense
當然我懷疑樓主有少少理解錯／
根據普及版本個d schrodinger's cat來去評論 qm

但至少有堆哲學家, logicians 討論 qm 同 classical logic 有冇衝突
（樓主好似預設左 佢好清楚 咩叫 logic, 咩邏輯世界一真一假咁) ：

https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Is_Logic_Empirical%3F
https://link.springer.com/article/10.1007/s11229-010-9783-6

One should not be misled by this terminology into thinking that what we have is an uninterpreted mathematical formalism with no connection to the physical world. Rather, there is a common core of interpretation that consists of recipes for calculating probabilities of outcomes of experiments performed on systems subjected to certain state preparation procedures. What are often referred to as different “interpretations” of quantum mechanics differ on what, if anything, is added to the common core. Arguably, two of the major approaches, hidden-variables theories and collapse theories, involve formulation of physical theories distinct from standard quantum mechanics; this renders the terminology of “interpretation” even more inappropriate.

你地講到好似有一個獨立於 interpretation 嘅 theory咁



https://plato.stanford.edu/entries/qt-issues/

One should not be misled by this terminology into thinking that what we have is an uninterpreted mathematical formalism with no connection to the physical world. Rather, there is a common core of interpretation that consists of recipes for calculating probabilities of outcomes of experiments performed on systems subjected to certain state preparation procedures. What are often referred to as different “interpretations” of quantum mechanics differ on what, if anything, is added to the common core. Arguably, two of the major approaches, hidden-variables theories and collapse theories, involve formulation of physical theories distinct from standard quantum mechanics; this renders the terminology of “interpretation” even more inappropriate.

replies.msg:
linear logic 係方便 cs 用途
但可以有 classical linear logic, intuitionistic linear logic etc.


QM 主要同 logic 嘅關係，
主要係Birkhoff, von Neumann最初想分析 QM 嘅邏輯結構
classical physics 可以用返傳統 classical Boolean logic 來分析，但 QM 就唔可以
所以，佢地搞左套 Quantum Logic出來

個時 193x年，邏輯學仲有好多野未出現，例如仲未有 formal semantics;
所以 Quantum logic 本身其實係好殘舊嘅野
去到 60,70年代，有堆哲學家就因為Quantum logic嘅存在，而話 logic 係經驗科學
之後一直個討論都係大約都係建基於對 logic 好殘舊嘅認識

係去到近呢 20年， logicians 先重新用比較新嘅資源 來分析 quantum structures
(當然，其實 physicists wfc )

「quantum mechanics 岩唔岩，點理解，有冇所謂岩唔岩」呢d屬於哲學問題

我問呢個問題原因係
以我對物理理解
應該唔會出現同邏輯衝突嘅理論

量子態上旋排斥下旋（上旋同下旋對立，好似生同死咁，唔會又生又死）
有咩可能講量子態同時上下旋

所以一係哥本哈根詮釋係真，邏輯係量子尺度下要補充
或哥本哈根詮釋係有缺失，邏輯上出現好大問題
或邏輯同物理係分開
或者真係有上下同旋

replies.msg:
Superposition state = pure state
唔會collapse嗰啲就叫eigenstate (相對於measurement方法而言, 例如量電子既spin要視乎拎邊到做z-axis)
mixed state就係幾個pure state按唔同比例混合, density matrix rho = sum p_i |psi_i><psi_i|
於是可以將classical probability同quantum probability擺埋一齊分析, 用喺stat mech到, 好似係

你唔識QM背後嘅數你先覺得唔合邏輯啫

事實上係無人會用呢個thought experiment做研究，連教書都唔會
巴打有興趣嘅就真係搵lecture notes或者真正嘅qm書睇(唔係quantum mechanics for dummies嗰啲)

replies.msg:
例如canonical ensemble有density matrix
e^(-H/kT)/Z = sum e^(-E_i/kT)/Z |i><i|
E_i = Eigenvalues of Hamiltonian H
因為density of states for eigenstate |i> = e^(-E_i/kT)/Z
呢個prob term 本身係classical prob
冇記錯既話

Superposition state = pure state
唔會collapse嗰啲就叫eigenstate (相對於measurement方法而言, 例如量電子既spin要視乎拎邊到做z-axis)
mixed state就係幾個pure state按唔同比例混合, density matrix rho = sum p_i |psi_i><psi_i|
於是可以將classical probability同quantum probability擺埋一齊分析, 用喺stat mech到, 好似係

例如canonical ensemble有density matrix
e^(-H/kT)/Z = sum e^(-E_i/kT)/Z |i><i|
E_i = Eigenvalues of Hamiltonian H
因為density of states for eigenstate |i> = e^(-E_i/kT)/Z
呢個prob term 本身係classical prob
冇記錯既話

replies.msg:
For pure states, rho = |psi><psi| (here |psi> may or may not be a superposition of eigenstates)
A is an observable
Tr(rho*A) = Tr(|psi><psi|A) = Tr(<psi|A|psi>) = <psi|A|psi>
(By Tr(ABC) = Tr(BCA) = Tr(CAB), and Tr(a) = a if a is a scalar)
For mixed states, rho = sum_i p_i * |psi_i><psi_i|
Tr(rho*A) = sum_i p_i * Tr(|psi_i><psi_i|A) = sum_i p_i * <A>
which is simply an classical expectation value of observable A
Mixed states cannot be expressed as a superposition of states, but only a density matrix, since a direct sum may confuse superposition of (eigen)states and a "classical mixture" of pure states
This framework can be extended to non-equilibrium statistical mechanics, e.g. in deriving fluctuation-dissipation theorem

你唔識QM背後嘅數你先覺得唔合邏輯啫
Schrodinger's cat係純屬俾啲唔熟物理嘅人知道qm大概係乜
事實上係無人會用呢個thought experiment做研究，連教書都唔會
巴打有興趣嘅就真係搵lecture notes或者真正嘅qm書睇(唔係quantum mechanics for dummies嗰啲)
利申physics grad，見親人鳩up qm都好炆
基本上phy都唔會探討interpretation既問題，只會塞一大堆數，計完之後其實都唔鳩知發生咩事 次鳩次都係硬爆wave function鳩爆bra-ket
依家學緊qft，發覺qm未算最on9

replies.msg: 下sem take 今sem take particle physics, 都有少少qft, 好似係
